step_rationale: Lipotoxic metabolite; atherosclerotic risk and lipid-core accumulation.
mechanism: Diacylglycerol accumulation drives lipotoxicity and contributes to atherosclerotic plaque lipid-core formation and lesion progression.

references.title: Postprandial Plasma Lipidomics Reveal Specific Alteration of Hepatic-derived Diacylglycerols in Nonalcoholic Fatty Liver Disease.
